powershell:
# Baixar o instalador do CloudWatch Agent curl.exe -o "C:\amazon-cloudwatch-agent.msi" "https://amazoncloudwatch-agent.s3.amazonaws.com/windows/amd64/latest/amazon-cloudwatch-agent.msi"
# Instalar o CloudWatch Agent Start-Process -FilePath "msiexec.exe" -ArgumentList '/i "C:\amazon-cloudwatch-agent.msi" /quiet /norestart' -NoNewWindow -Wait
# Aplicar a configuração padrão para EC2 & "C:\Program Files\Amazon\AmazonCloudWatchAgent\amazon-cloudwatch-agent-ctl.ps1" -a fetch-config -m ec2 -c default -s
# Iniciar o CloudWatch Agent & "C:\Program Files\Amazon\AmazonCloudWatchAgent\amazon-cloudwatch-agent-ctl.ps1" -a start
Write-Output "CloudWatch Agent installation and configuration completed successfully."
